race.comment: The 2YO's get things underway. LIFETIME DREAM (9) has impressed at the trials coming into this, with three trials under his belt suggesting he's ready to fire right away. Things look to work out nicely for Chris Parnham and he can make an immediate impact. RIFLEMAN (3) finished off strongly on debut over this course and distance to be 1.3L off the winner. The splits there were superb and he should be better for the debut run. He makes plenty of appeal with natural improvement on the cards. THEY'REALLSISTERS (1) comes here without a trial and with the blinkers on for the first time. She jumped a leading chance in the Magic Millions where she was only 0.8L off the winner. Has plenty of talent and it wouldn't surprise to see her negotiate the wide barrier. DIGGERS SHOUT (5) was impressive at the trials recently and the booking of Pike is a big push for his chances. CRYPTO CONQUEROR (4) is trialling well and can't be left out of calculations.
